'''P'tan''' was a senior [[Professor/Legends|professor]] at [[Beshka University]]. He stole his young colleague [[Melvosh Bloor]]'s proposal to interview [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]]. [[Salacious B. Crumb/Legends|Salacious B. Crumb]] impersonated his guide [[Darian Gli]] (who was already [[Death/Legends|dead]]) and led him to Jabba, who had him dropped into the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]].

{{Char-stub}}
